title: luzula nivea subvar. livida
intro: Luzula nivea subvar. livida, also known as Woodrush, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae, characterized by its small white or purple flowers and narrow, grass-like leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Luzula nivea subvar. livida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
